aleabit.layer_label: T700/T800 carbon fiber for military aerospace
aleabit.verdict_label: Mil-grade carbon fiber duopoly, defense bottleneck
aleabit.thesis: One of two domestic qualified suppliers of high-modulus carbon fiber to PLA aerospace programs. Classic bottleneck: certification moat, single-source for several end-uses, lumpy but very high margin. No AI capex thread but textbook 'trading unknown bottlenecks' setup on defense side. Lumpy order risk, but the bottleneck itself is real.
